# bnto

> Compress images, clean CSVs, rename files, and convert formats. Free, instant, 100% in your browser. No signup, no upload. Open source.

## Tools

- [Compress Images](https://bnto.dev/compress-images): Compress PNG, JPEG, and WebP images in your browser. Free, no signup.
- [Resize Images](https://bnto.dev/resize-images): Resize images to exact dimensions or percentages. Free, no signup.
- [Convert Image Format](https://bnto.dev/convert-image-format): Convert between PNG, JPEG, WebP, and GIF formats. Free, no signup.
- [Rename Files](https://bnto.dev/rename-files): Batch rename files with patterns. Free, no signup.
- [Clean CSV](https://bnto.dev/clean-csv): Remove empty rows, trim whitespace, deduplicate CSV data. Free, no signup.
- [Rename CSV Columns](https://bnto.dev/rename-csv-columns): Rename CSV column headers in bulk. Free, no signup.
